page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the custom 64-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 ARM64 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and utilizing a KVM hypervisor. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 32 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows strong multi-threaded capabilities, highlighted by a top-tier rating in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 486.63 GB/sec and a strong stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 114,685.05. Memory performance is notable, with a top-tier PassMark memory score and strong cached small-block read bandwidth of 6,476.63 GB/sec, though large-block read and write bandwidths fall into the average tier. Database operations and Redis SET operations at 94.6 million operations per second also demonstrate strong performance. Single-core performance and LLM inference speeds for small and medium models remain in the average tier.

The ARM64 architecture delivers high resource density and strong multi-threaded efficiency, making it a qualitatively cost-effective option for parallelizable workloads. However, users should note the lack of local storage and the absence of x86-specific instruction sets such as AVX or AMX. The instance is best suited for multi-threaded CPU-bound workloads, database operations, web serving, and containerized microservices that benefit from dedicated physical cores and high network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance powered by a 64-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores, 128.0 GB of RAM, and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-threaded decompression and memory performance, alongside strong multi-core CPU and database execution speeds. However, single-core performance and large-block memory bandwidth remain average. The instance lacks x86 instruction sets like AVX and AMX. The KVM-based architecture ensures dedicated resource allocation, making it a reliable choice for scale-out workloads that do not require local SSD storage. This profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized, CPU-bound tasks, making it suited for multi-threaded processing, database operations, and web serving workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Yitian YiTian710 cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-threaded performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Yitian cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An ARM64-based compute instance delivering 64 dedicated physical cores and strong multi-threaded performance for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 ARM64 processor with 64 dedicated physical cores
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and Redis SET benchmark results
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for multi-threaded processing, database operations, and web serving
